title: Chart & Manifest Backfill: Test & Simulation
intent: Ensure 11_test_simulation/ has complete chart.yaml (WAS) and manifest.yaml (WIE) for all shards, contracts, and implementations. Test suites, simulation harnesses, and QA compliance.
acceptance_checks: chart.yaml exists and is fully populated in 11_test_simulation/
manifest.yaml exists and is fully populated in 11_test_simulation/
